meta.description: Protect your crypto wallet with Revoke Sidekick. Get transaction simulation, approval checking, address poisoning detection, ad warnings, and optional theft coverage up to $30,000.
meta.title: Revoke Sidekick Browser Extension

paragraph_1: Revoke Sidekick is a browser extension that protects your crypto wallet from scams and threats, developed and operated in partnership with Fairside.
paragraph_2: The extension simulates every transaction before you sign it, showing you exactly which tokens will leave your wallet, which will arrive, and what approvals will be granted. You can also check your token approvals directly from the extension for a quick overview on the go.
paragraph_3: Beyond transaction simulation, Revoke Sidekick detects address poisoning on block explorers, warns you about sponsored phishing links on Google, flags impersonator accounts on X with Ethos reputation scores, includes a hold-to-confirm slow mode for suspicious transactions, and provides theft coverage of up to $30,000.
paragraph_4: Revoke Sidekick works with many EVM-based networks, including Ethereum, BNB Chain and Polygon.
title: Revoke Sidekick Browser Extension
